majorProjects.title: Portfolio Experience Platform
majorProjects.description: A personal portfolio system with animated storytelling, bold section transitions, and reusable UI components for showcasing work and achievements.

majorProjects.title: Campus Event Management App
majorProjects.description: A responsive web app for browsing, registering, and managing student events with role-based dashboards and optimized event discovery flows.

majorProjects.title: Creative Agency Showcase
majorProjects.description: A high-impact showcase website built with immersive layouts, polished motion, and a conversion-focused structure for digital studio presentation.

minorProjects.title: Weather Pulse
minorProjects.description: A compact weather interface for current conditions and forecast highlights with a clean, mobile-friendly layout.

minorProjects.title: Task Sprint
minorProjects.description: A lightweight productivity tool for organizing daily tasks with priorities, states, and quick action controls.

minorProjects.title: Notes Vault
minorProjects.description: A simple note-keeping app with category filters and a focused reading and editing experience.
